channel.title: Vit D Binding Protein on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Vit D Binding Protein on VitaminDWiki

item.title: The potential role of vitamin D binding protein in kidney disease: a comprehensive review
item.description:
• Jan 2024 study
      • VitaminDWiki – Chronic Kidney Disease needs Vitamin D: how much, what kind - many studies
      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Binding Protein - health problems

Jan 2024 study

International Journal of Clinical and Laboratory Medicine https://doi.org/10.1080/17843286.2023.2301278

Joris R. Delanghe,Charlotte Delrue,Reinhart Speeckaert &Marijn M. Speeckaert ORCID

Chronic kidney disease (CKD) is a growing health concern with a complex etiological landscape. Among the numerous factors implicated, vitamin D binding protein (VDBP) has emerged as a focal point of scientific studies because of its critical role in vitamin D metabolism and immune modulation. The relationship between VDBP and CKD reveals a complex web of molecular and biochemical details that have great potential for improving diagnostic understanding and treatment strategies for CKD. This review summarizes the multifaceted roles of VDBP, including its molecular dynamics, interactions with vitamin D, and subsequent implications for kidney function.

item.title: Non-oral Vitamin D should be a better form for MS, food allergy, PTSD, etc. – many studies
item.description:
The risk of 8+ health problems increases by >2 times if poor Vitamin D Binding Protein

Non-oral forms of Vitamin D are NOT blocked by a poor Vitamin D Binding Protein

Non-oral forms include: topical, patches, injection, UV, sublingual and inhaled

      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Binding Protein - list of health problems
      • Studies of VDBP and diseases: Pregnancy 10, Skin - Dark 8, Breathing 7, Infant-Child 7, Multiple Sclerosis 6, Virus 6, Cardiovascular 6, Diabetes 5, Autoimmune 4, Cancer - Other 4, Obesity 4, Tuberculosis 4 – Jan 2024

VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Binding Protein - list of health problems

Studies of VDBP and diseases: Pregnancy 10, Skin - Dark 8, Breathing 7, Infant-Child 7, Multiple Sclerosis 6, Virus 6, Cardiovascular 6, Diabetes 5, Autoimmune 4, Cancer - Other 4, Obesity 4, Tuberculosis 4 – Jan 2024


Markdown:
--------


The risk of 8+ health problems  increases by >2 times if poor Vitamin D Binding Protein

Non-oral forms of Vitamin D are NOT blocked by a poor Vitamin D Binding Protein

Non-oral forms include: topical, patches, injection, UV, sublingual and inhaled

{{< toc >}}

---

#### VitaminDWiki – <a href="/posts/vitamin-d-binding-protein" style="color: red; text-decoration: underline;" title="This post/category does not exist yet: Vitamin D Binding Protein">Vitamin D Binding Protein</a>  - list of health problems

---

#### Studies of VDBP and diseases: Pregnancy 10, Skin - Dark 8, Breathing 7, Infant-Child 7, Multiple Sclerosis 6, Virus 6, Cardiovascular 6, Diabetes 5, Autoimmune 4, Cancer - Other 4, Obesity 4, Tuberculosis 4 – Jan 2024


AST Structure:
-------------
├── DivNode
│   full_match: `{DIV(style="font-size:18px;")}\nThe risk of 8+ health problems  increases by >2 times if poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms of Vitamin D are NOT blocked by a poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms include: topical, patches, injection, UV, sublingual and inhaled\n{DIV}`
│   inner_content: `\nThe risk of 8+ health problems  increases by >2 times if poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms of Vitamin D are NOT blocked by a poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms include: topical, patches, injection, UV, sublingual and inhaled\n`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: (style="font-size:18px;")
│   │   style: font-size:18px;
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `\nThe risk of 8+ health problems  increases by >2 times if poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms of Vitamin D are NOT blocked by a poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms include: topical, patches, injection, UV, sublingual and inhaled\n`
│   │   inner_content: `\nThe risk of 8+ health problems  increases by >2 times if poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms of Vitamin D are NOT blocked by a poor Vitamin D Binding Protein\nNon-oral forms include: topical, patches, injection, UV, sublingual and inhaled\n`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── DivNode
│   full_match: `{DIV(class="lefth4")}{maketoc Title=""}{DIV}`
│   inner_content: `{maketoc Title=""}`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: (class="lefth4")
│   │   class: lefth4
│   children:
│   ├── MakeTocNode
│   │   full_match: `{maketoc Title=""}`
│   │   inner_content: ``
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content:  Title=""
│   │   │   Title: ├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((Vitamin D Binding Protein))  category listing  has  ~~#00F:{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=143{SQL} items~~ `
│   inner_content: `VitaminDWiki – ((Vitamin D Binding Protein))  category listing  has  ~~#00F:{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=143{SQL} items~~`
│   level: `4`
│   children:

Original Tiki:
-------------
{DIV(style="font-size:18px;")}
The risk of 8+ health problems  increases by >2 times if poor Vitamin D Binding Protein
Non-oral forms of Vitamin D are NOT blocked by a poor Vitamin D Binding Protein
Non-oral forms include: topical, patches, injection, UV, sublingual and inhaled
{DIV}
{DIV(class="lefth4")}{maketoc Title=""}{DIV}
---
!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((Vitamin D Binding Protein))  category listing  has  ~~#00F:{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE `categId`=143{SQL} items~~ 
{include page="Vitamin D Binding Protein" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ end ~/tc~"}
---
!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((Vitamin D Binding Protein))  - list of health problems
{include page="Vitamin D Binding Protein" start="~tc~ start2 ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ end2 ~/tc~"}
---
!!!!Studies of VDBP and diseases: Pregnancy 10, Skin - Dark 8, Breathing 7, Infant-Child 7, Multiple Sclerosis 6, Virus 6, Cardiovascular 6, Diabetes 5, Autoimmune 4, Cancer - Other 4, Obesity 4, Tuberculosis 4 – Jan 2024
---
!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((Topical Vitamin D)) category contains
{include page="Topical Vitamin D" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ end ~/tc~"}
---
!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((Injection)) contains
{include page="Injection" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ end ~/tc~"}
~tc~ (alias(Non-oral Vitamin D should be a better form if MS, Preeclampsia, food allergy, PTSD, etc. – many studies)) ~/tc~

item.title: Many genes can restrict Vitamin D from getting to the cells
item.description:
• Vitamin D: An Overview of Gene Regulation, Ranging from Metabolism to Genomic Effects
      • VitaminDWiki – Some diseases reduce vitamin D getting to blood or cells
      • VitaminDWiki - The risk of 50+ diseases at least double with poor Vitamin D Receptor
      • VitaminDWiki - Vitamin D Receptor activation can be increased in many ways
      • There are expensive ways of estimating vitamin D in cells. but they are rarely used
      • It appears that 1/3 of people with Vitamin D diseases have a poor Vitamin d Receptor

Vitamin D: An Overview of Gene Regulation, Ranging from Metabolism to Genomic Effects

Genes 2023, 14(9), 1691; https://doi.org/10.3390/genes14091691

item.title: Vitamin D and it’s related genes regulate the immune system
item.description:
• A review of the critical role of vitamin D axis on the immune system - Aug 2023
      • A review of the role of vitamin d in autoimmunity - Aug 2023
      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Receptor is associated in over 58 autoimmune studies

A review of the critical role of vitamin D axis on the immune system - Aug 2023

Exp Mol Pathol. 2023 Aug 10;104866. doi: 10.1016/j.yexmp.2023.104866   PDF not available

item.title: Melanoma death risk 0.63 X lower if poor Vitamin D Binding Gene
item.description:
• Association of functional, inherited vitamin D-binding protein variants with melanoma-specific death
      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Binding Protein has a list of health problems
      • Note: Other studies have found an INCREASE in cancer problems with Vitamin D Binding Protein
      • See also: Melanoma might be suppressed by Vitamin D - many studies

Association of functional, inherited vitamin D-binding protein variants with melanoma-specific death

JNCI Cancer Spectr . 2023 Jul 26;pkad051. doi: 10.1093/jncics/pkad051

item.title: 12 Vitamin D genes (Most are not noticed by blood test)
item.description:
• Association between Polymorphisms in Vitamin D Pathway-Related Genes, Vitamin D Status, Muscle Mass and Function: A Systematic Review
      • Study: GC, CYP2R1, VDR, CYP24A1, DHCR7, CYP27B1, CYP27A1, CASR, PTH, CYP3A4, RXRA, CUBN
      • Note: It appears that GC (binding), CYP3A4, CYP24A1, and CYP27A1 genes

Association between Polymorphisms in Vitamin D Pathway-Related Genes, Vitamin D Status, Muscle Mass and Function: A Systematic Review

Nutrients 2021, 13(9), 3109; https://doi.org/10.3390/nu13093109

by Ermira Krasniqi 1,2,3ORCID,Arben Boshnjaku 2,4ORCID, Karl-Heinz Wagner 1,3ORCID and Barbara Wessner 1,2,*ORCID

item.title: Higher Vitamin D-binding protein is good (neonates in this case)
item.description:
• Genetic correlates of vitamin D-binding protein and 25-hydroxyvitamin D in neonatal dried blood spots
      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Binding Protein has a list of health problems
      • VitaminDWiki - Genetics chart shows the vitamin D genes

Genetic correlates of vitamin D-binding protein and 25-hydroxyvitamin D in neonatal dried blood spots

.Nat Commun 2023 Feb 15;14(1):852. doi: 10.1038/s41467-023-36392-5.

Clara Albiñana 1, Zhihong Zhu 1, Nis Borbye-Lorenzen 2, Sanne Grundvad Boelt 2 3, Arieh S Cohen 4, Kristin Skogstrand 2, Naomi R Wray 5 6, Joana A Revez 5, Florian Privé 1, Liselotte V Petersen 1 7, Cynthia M Bulik 8 9 10, Oleguer Plana-Ripoll 1 11, Katherine L Musliner 12, Esben Agerbo 1 7 13, Anders D Børglum 7 14 15, David M Hougaard 7 16, Merete Nordentoft 7 17 18, Thomas Werge 7 19 20 21, Preben Bo Mortensen 1 7 13, Bjarni J Vilhjálmsson 1 7 22, John J McGrath 23 24 25

item.title: Parkinson’s Disease, low vitamin D and Vit. D genetics
item.description:
• Vitamin D deficiency and genetic polymorphisms of Vitamin D-associated genes in Parkinson’s Disease
      • VitaminDWiki – Cancers might alter CYP24A1 gene
      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Binding Protein has a list of health problems

Vitamin D deficiency and genetic polymorphisms of Vitamin D-associated genes in Parkinson’s Disease

European Journal of Neuroscience preprint DOI: 10.22541/au.167407862.25881100/v1
